summary: HTTP client for OpenRouter API with chat completion endpoint and request/response type definitions
side_effects: Makes HTTP requests to external OpenRouter API endpoint
Includes API key in Authorization header
Creates HTTP client with default timeout
notes: Provides API client for OpenRouter service. Defines request/response types reused by OllamaClient. Single method: ChatCompletion. Converts ChatRequest type (from summarizer.go) to openRouterRequest for API call.
